decision: Completed devmasterd local control-plane activation proposal.
summary: Drafted a bounded devmasterd local control-plane activation proposal and queued Gate H, Phase 6, and Gate I. The proposal requires bearer token auth on localhost and limits the first daemon slice to local queue/state/evidence APIs and provider adapter fixture execution.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Gate H review. Do not start daemon implementation until Gate H confirms token auth, local-only scope, provider fixture-only execution, and no Web/IDE/real provider/external repo side effects.
notes: Proposal recommends promote, but implementation remains gated by Gate H.
First daemon slice is localhost-only and requires bearer token auth.
